---
title: "Visual Analytics & Applications"
page-layout: custom
listing:
  - id: latest-posts
    contents: 
      - "HO_EX/**/*.qmd"
      - "IC_EX/**/*.qmd"
      - "TH_EX/**/*.qmd"
      - "FIN_PROJ/**/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3        
    max-items: 3
    image-height: "200px" 
    fields: [image, title, subtitle, date]
---

::::::: {.grid .category-grid}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3 .category-card}
### Expeditions

**`Hands-on Exercises`**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3 .category-card}
### Live Sprints

**`In-class Exercises`**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3 .category-card}
### Deep Dives

**`Take-home Exercises`**
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3 .category-card .masterpiece-card}

### The Masterpiece

**`Final Project`**
:::
:::::::

::: {style="max-width: 950px; margin: 0 auto;"}

### Current Deployments:

::: {#latest-posts}
:::

:::
